expect.caption: Figure 2 Calculated diffraction patterns for various lattice $s = ( h ^ { 2 } + k ^ { 2 } + l ^ { 2 } )$

overrides.reason: ch04 problem 3 的正文要求『Plot the values ... in the manner of Fig 10-2』；同書 ch10 body[41] 的 caption 明確是 Figure 2，屬第 10 章第 2 圖。補語意 id fig-10.2 並移除 unnumbered_body_fig，使該跨章引用有真實 catalog 供應。
